summary: Replayed ADR 0274 from the latest merged origin/main candidate, fixed the exact-main helper path and nftables-only publication verification edge cases, and confirmed the governed repo-deploy image warm-cache contract end to end.

verification.observed: `python3 scripts/repo_deploy_image_cache.py validate` reported `Repo-deploy base image profile catalog OK`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-repo-deploy-validate.txt`.
`python3 scripts/repo_deploy_image_cache.py plan` rendered one approved profile and five seed refs, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-repo-deploy-plan.txt`.

`uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_repo_deploy_image_cache.py tests/test_coolify_playbook.py tests/test_coolify_runtime_role.py tests/test_docker_publication_assurance.py tests/test_tika_playbook.py tests/test_tika_runtime_role.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py` returned `70 passed in 26.52s`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-targeted-pytest.txt`.

`uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_docker_publication_assurance.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py` returned `26 passed in 24.61s`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-docker-publication-regression.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=coolify env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` completed with zero failed or unreachable hosts, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-live-apply.txt`; the final recap reported `coolify-lv3 : ok=161 changed=10 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=81 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=273 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=134`.

`sudo /usr/local/bin/lv3-docker-publication-assurance` returned `ok: true` with summary `docker publication contract is satisfied`, while legacy `iptables` chain probes exited `127` and were correctly treated as non-fatal on the `nftables`-only guest; recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-docker-publication-verify.txt`.

`/opt/repo-deploy-image-cache/warm-status.json` reported `result: pass`, `successful_pulls: 5`, `failed_pulls: 0`, `changed_count: 0`, `plan_generated_at: 2026-03-30T13:40:31Z`, and `warmed_at: 2026-03-30T13:40:37Z`, while `lv3-repo-deploy-image-cache.timer` remained enabled and active; recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-coolify-cache-state-post.txt`.
`docker image inspect` resolved all five approved seed refs locally on `coolify-lv3`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-image-inspect.txt`.

`https://coolify.lv3.org/` and `/login` both returned the expected TLS-backed `302` redirect to `/oauth2/sign_in` with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-coolify-public-head.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-coolify-login-head.txt`.

`docs.lv3.org` and `changelog.lv3.org` still served `robots.txt` with `Disallow: /` after the exact-main replay, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-robots.txt`.

The Proxmox host remained `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base` on kernel `6.17.13-2-pve` with `pve-manager/9.1.6` and VM `170` running after the replay, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0274-mainline-r6-host-state-post.txt`.

notes: The exact-main live apply was executed from the refreshed latest-main candidate rooted at source commit 4ee7c5c596d6a9013c825576a45c9a4134512c9d.

The preserved `r6` evidence captures the initial failed replay caused by a helper installation path that assumed the primary worktree layout, and the follow-up verification run before the nftables-only fallback was added.

A concurrent ADR 0296 mainline release advanced origin/main to 0.177.103 while this branch was clearing remote validation, so ADR 0274 is integrated on top as 0.177.104 while preserving the same verified platform version 0.130.69 and the already-converged coolify-lv3 runtime state.
